name: Croque Monsieur
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20-25 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 400°F (204°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Once melted, add the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the milk and whisk until thickened, about 3-4 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, mustard, and nutmeg. Set aside.
Line the prepared baking sheet with 4 slices of bread. Add half of the sauce. Top each slice with the prosciutto slices, Gruyere cheese, and another slice of bread.
Top the sandwiches with the remaining sauce. Sprinkle the sandwiches with the parmesan cheese.
